series_metadata.series_title: BCI Ticket Testing Reports and Receipts.
series_metadata.series_description: File contains hard copy of analytical reports received from BCI regarding scientific testing of scratch off tickets.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for five (5) years in hard copy format in a secure area with access limited only to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities, review for administrative value, if none, then destroy., Paper: Shred
